title: NspInstance
description: A single Nurse Scheduling Problem instance. Canonical wire format for the NSP app (specs/nsp-app/03-domain-model.md). Aligned with the teaching toy format at data/nsp/schema.json.

id.description: Unique identifier for this instance (e.g. 'toy-01', 'inrc2-n030w4-0-8-9-6-4-8-2-2'). Server-generated if omitted on upload.

horizonDays.description: Number of days in the planning horizon (0..horizonDays-1).

shifts.description: Shift types that a nurse can work. An off-day is the absence of any shift.

coverage.description: Required number of nurses per (day, shift) cell.

preferences.description: Soft preferences (flat list at instance root) contributing to SC-1.

forbiddenTransitions.description: Ordered (shiftA -> shiftB) pairs that may not occur on consecutive days. Example: ['N','M'] forbids a morning after a night.

minRestHours.description: Minimum rest hours between consecutive shifts (EU Working Time Directive baseline = 11). Used to derive forbiddenTransitions when shifts declare startMinutes/durationMinutes.

maxConsecutiveWorkingDays.description: Global upper bound on consecutive days any nurse can work (HC-4); per-nurse override via Nurse.maxConsecutiveWorkingDays.

maxConsecutiveNights.description: Global upper bound on consecutive night shifts (HC-5).

metadata.description: Free-form per-instance metadata (loader version, benchmark tag, contractTolerance, etc.).

start.description: Local-time start in 24-hour HH:MM format (toy-style alternative to startMinutes).

end.description: Local-time end in 24-hour HH:MM format (toy-style alternative to startMinutes+durationMinutes).

startMinutes.description: Local-time start minute of the shift (0..1439). Either startMinutes+durationMinutes or start+end must be present.

isNight.description: Explicit night-shift tag for HC-5; if omitted, inferred from startMinutes or id/label matching.

skill.description: Required skill tag (a nurse must hold this skill to be assigned the shift).

contractHoursPerWeek.description: Weekly contract hours used by HC-8.

unavailable.description: Day indices (0..horizonDays-1) on which the nurse cannot be assigned any shift.

min.description: Minimum number of nurses required for this cell.

max.description: Maximum number of nurses assignable to this cell. Must be >= min.

required.description: Alias for 'min' when uploading. If present without min/max, it is treated as both the floor and the ceiling (exact staffing).

requiredSkills.description: Skill tags — the nurses on this cell must collectively cover each tag (HC-7).

day.description: Day index within the horizon. Optional: if omitted, the preference applies across every day.

shiftId.description: Null = preference about a day-off; string = preference about a specific shift. May be omitted.

kind.description: Preferences of kind 'prefer' reward assignment; 'avoid' penalize it.

weight.description: Strength of the preference; higher = stronger.
